Opportunity Architect
Profile

Where Discretion
Meets Influence

Taib Ait Malek is a globally connected strategic advisor and opportunity architect operating at the intersection of business, sport, and investment. Through TAM & Partners — his London-registered firm — he has built an unrivalled network spanning the Gulf Cooperation Council, North Africa, and Southeast Asia.

His approach is singular: he does not simply advise — he creates. Every engagement is guided by integrity, discretion, and an unwavering commitment to outcomes. Whether facilitating a cross-border acquisition, brokering a landmark talent transfer, or opening doors between sovereign stakeholders, Taib operates where most cannot.

In 2026, he assumed the role of Chief Operating Officer at Valeurs & Patrimoine, Morocco's foremost investment and wealth management hub — deepening his commitment to North Africa's most dynamic market.

Core Expertise

Three Pillars of
Strategic Value

TAM & Partners is not a traditional consultancy. It is a precision instrument for those who understand that in high-stakes environments, access and trust are worth more than any retainer. Taib's mandate is simple: connect the exceptional to the exceptional.

Operating with the rigour of a London firm and the cultural fluency of a global citizen, TAM & Partners brings a rare combination of legal acumen, regional intelligence, and relationship capital.

01

Strategic Introductions

Orchestrating high-value connections between decision-makers, institutions, and investors across GCC, North Africa, and Southeast Asia — with the discretion that landmark deals demand.

02

Deal Facilitation

Navigating complex negotiations and cross-border transactions with legal precision and cultural intelligence. From term sheets to closing, TAM ensures every detail serves the outcome.

03

Brand & Talent Partnerships

Aligning elite athletes, luxury brands, and sovereign entities in partnerships that transcend the transactional — creating lasting equity and mutual prestige across global markets.

Global Footprint

A Network Built
on Trust

TAM & Partners operates at the intersection of markets where relationships take years to build and moments to leverage. Taib's geographic intelligence spans three distinct economic corridors.

⚽ Football & Elite Sport
Sport Intelligence

Where Football
Meets Finance

At the elite echelons of world football, transfers are not merely sporting decisions — they are strategic investments. Taib Ait Malek operates at this intersection, providing the trusted bridge between elite players and top-tier clubs across global markets.

His presence at FIFA events and deep relationships within international football give TAM & Partners an edge that no database can replicate. Relationships, reputation, and room-reading — the true currency of elite sport.

◆
Player–Club Introductions

Facilitating strategic talent placements between elite players and leading European and Gulf clubs.

◆
FIFA & International Engagement

Established presence at global football's most significant summits and decision-making forums.

◆
Image & Commercial Rights

Structuring commercial partnerships that amplify athlete value beyond the pitch, into luxury and lifestyle.

The FA · England
Sport Consultancy
LT SPORTS Make the Difference

Co-founded with Larbi Makhzoumi, LT SPORTS is a premier sport consulting and management firm built on over 20 years of experience at the highest levels of professional football. The firm brings together two officially licensed agents whose credentials span the global game.

LT SPORTS offers bespoke solutions across talent representation, club advisory, and commercial partnership — delivering outcomes that transcend the transactional for players, clubs, and brands alike.

Immobilier & Patrimoine
VALEUR ET PATRIMOINE

Co-fondée par Taib Ait-Malek et Youssef Douh, Valeur et Patrimoine accompagne ses clients dans la structuration et la valorisation de leur patrimoine immobilier et financier, avec une approche sur mesure et une exigence de résultat.

Strategic Partnership · Executive Role
Valeurs & Patrimoine · Premier HUB d'investissement au Maroc

COO — Valeurs
& Patrimoine

Taib Ait Malek serves as Chief Operating Officer of Valeurs & Patrimoine — Morocco's foremost investment and wealth management hub. In this executive role, he orchestrates international business development and brings his global network of investors, institutions, and high-net-worth individuals directly into Morocco's most dynamic real estate market.

Valeurs & Patrimoine guides discerning investors through structuring, acquisition, and portfolio enhancement — with exclusive partnerships with Morocco's leading developers across Marrakech, Casablanca and beyond.
